name: interview-scheduling
description: Hiring manager schedules a first technical screen. Should produce a stage signal toward 'screen' or 'interview' depending on the framing, plus a dated event.

input.subject: RE: Staff Engineer interview — Wed 11 June 14:00 UTC?
input.bodyText:
Hi Lucas,

Thanks for the application — really enjoyed reading your write-up on the consensus protocol piece.

We'd like to do a 60-min technical screen with one of our staff engineers, Priya Raghavan. Wed 11 June at 14:00 UTC works on her side. Let me know if that lands for you and I'll send a Google Meet link.

For prep: bring a system you've designed that you're happy to talk through end-to-end. No coding test.

Best,
Marcus Chen
Head of Engineering, Anthropic

stageSignal.reason: '60-min technical screen' is unambiguous — moving from applied to screen stage.

relationships.sourceQuote:
Marcus Chen
Head of Engineering, Anthropic
one of our staff engineers, Priya Raghavan

expected.summary: Anthropic's Head of Engineering Marcus Chen is offering a 60-min technical screen with Staff Engineer Priya Raghavan on 11 June 14:00 UTC.
